reviewers.summary: No blocking findings. Two advisory: (1) isValidExecutableName recompiles regex on every call -- pre-existing, not introduced by this diff. (2) discoverExecutables retains unused context parameter.
No blocking findings. One advisory: isValidExecutableName regex recompilation on every call (pre-existing issue, not introduced by this diff).

No blocking findings. Three advisory: (1) Build() accesses executables[0] without length check, relying on implicit invariant from discoverExecutables fallback. (2) discoverExecutables retains unused context parameter. (3) Test boilerplate repetition matches existing style.
